title: Duplicated quoted-string signature parser
description:
The logic for splitting a Signature header value respecting quoted strings and backslash escapes is implemented twice, nearly identically:

1. src/signatures.rs split_signature_params() lines 128-159
2. src/server.rs extract_key_id_from_sig() lines 1212-1250

Both have the same escape_next/in_quotes/comma-split logic. The only difference is what they extract from the result (signatures.rs extracts headers= and signature=; server.rs extracts keyId=).

What goes wrong: a bug fix to the parser (e.g., handling edge cases in escape sequences) must be applied in two places or one will diverge. This is the kind of duplication that becomes a security bug.

Fix: extract split_signature_params into a shared function (it already exists in signatures.rs). Have extract_key_id_from_sig call it and scan the result for the keyId= part.
